message:
fix: normalize navbar button heights to consistent h-9 (#7639)

* fix: normalize navbar button heights to consistent h-9 (36px)

All toolbar buttons used different sizing — filter was 32px, AI Missions
was 44px, theme toggle was 44px, Learn was ~40px. Standardize every
navbar button to h-9 (36px) to match the AI Status and Update pills.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* fix: add nil receiver guard to promoteExecutingDefault

nilaway flagged registry.go:227 — the receiver `r` could be nil since
globalRegistry starts as nil. Other Registry methods already guard with
`if r == nil`, this one was missing.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -168,7 +168,7 @@ export function ClusterFilterPanel() {
         <button
           onClick={() => toggleDropdown()}
           className={cn(
-            'relative flex items-center justify-center w-8 h-8 rounded-lg transition-colors',
+            'relative flex items-center justify-center w-9 h-9 rounded-lg transition-colors',
             isFiltered
               ? 'bg-purple-500/20 text-purple-400 shadow-[0_0_6px_rgba(139,92,246,0.2)]'
               : 'bg-secondary/50 text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground'

@@ -68,7 +68,7 @@ export function LearnDropdown() {
       <button
         onClick={toggle}
         className={cn(
-          'flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-2 rounded-lg text-sm transition-colors',
+          'flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-1.5 h-9 rounded-lg text-sm transition-colors',
           hasCompletedTour
             ? 'text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground hover:bg-secondary/50'
             : 'bg-purple-500/20 text-purple-400 hover:bg-purple-500/30 animate-pulse'
